source: INTRO MODULE_ The Basics of Nodes and Node Dojo_2MAY2024.blend

driver.note: The supplied Blender file displays its cached frame-1 Geometry Nodes result on open even though the scene timeline is saved at frame 1405. The gallery preserves that visible on-open reference state.

validation: Exact topology and matching Node Dojo emblem composition, with maximum local-bounds difference below 0.000075 units. Set Curve Tilt and Sample Curve reproduce the arced title, while extracted pixel-font contours, explicit line-break instances, half-em character spacing, and shared-corner Fill Curve welding reproduce the WELCOME/to the lettering. Curve to Points now interpolates Blender-compatible source tangent and normal frames for the radial instances.
